## Iodm class

Iodm is the main class of the package. It is used to create models and apply plugins.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class Iodm 
```

## Remarks

Iodm is a Singleton class, meaning that there is only one instance of it throughout the application. This instance is exported as the default export of the package.
